song.title: You
song.presentation: V1 V2 V3 P C V4 C P C E
song.lyrics:
[V1] Invading all my weakness You wrapped me up in grace The worst of me succeeded by the best of You
[V2] My heart is overtaken My soul is overwhelmed The worst of me succeded by the best of You
[V3] My dreams have found their purpose My future in Your hands This life would have no meaning if it weren't for You
[P] So I lay me down For Kingdom come Steal all that is within me Cause all I want in this world Is more of You
[C] And the less of me it is You Increasing as I fade away Your light for all the world to see God, it is You who breaks the chains It is You who lights the way And everything I am cries out for You
[V4] Lord, make my life transparent Your life in mine displayed And let every earthly glory go back to You
[E] And the less of me it is You Increasing as I fade away Your light for all the world to see God, it is You who breaks the chains It is You who lights the way And everything I am cries out for You Lord, make my life transparent Your life in mine displayed And let every earthly glory go back to You
